title: Equitable
summary: 9084 Contract — specific performance, injunction, and equitable remedies.
learningObjectives: Explain when specific performance may be granted.
Evaluate limits: adequacy of damages, mutuality, supervision.
Apply to land, unique goods, and negative covenants.

simpleExplanation.title: When money isn't enough
simpleExplanation.summary: Equitable remedies compel performance or restrain breach — available when damages are inadequate, especially for land and unique items.
steps: Injunction — restrain breach of negative term.

sections.content: **Equitable remedies** (3.4.2) completes Paper 3. Contrast **damages vs SP** and **discretion**.
